mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as survey_count, AVG(survey_count) as avg_survey_count FROM stock_sentiment_survey WHERE code = #{code} AND max_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN zt_type = 'zt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as limit_up_count, SUM(CASE WHEN zt_type = 'zbgc' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as broken_count, AVG(strength) as avg_strength FROM stock_sentiment_zt WHERE code = #{code} AND trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)

SELECT fi.roe as roe, fi.revenue_yoy as revenueYoy, fi.net_profit_yoy as netProfitYoy, fi.gross_profit_margin as grossMargin, fi.debt_to_asset_ratio as debtRatio FROM stock_financial_indicator fi WHERE fi.code = #{code} AND fi.end_date = (SELECT MAX(end_date) FROM stock_financial_indicator WHERE code = #{code}) LIMIT 1

SELECT 0 as limitUpDays, 0 as limitUpStrength, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_sentiment_zt WHERE code = #{code} AND zt_type = 'zbgc' AND trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 20 DAY)) as brokenLimitUpCount20, 0.0 as brokenLimitUpRate, FALSE as isStrongStock FROM dual
SELECT si.name FROM stock_info si WHERE si.code = #{code} LIMIT 1

SELECT (SELECT rating FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND rating IS NOT NULL AND rating != '' ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT 1) as latestRating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND report_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)) as reportCount FROM dual
SELECT rating, institution, report_date as reportDate, report_title as reportTitle, eps_forecast as epsForecast FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT rating, institution, report_date as reportDate, report_title as reportTitle, eps_forecast as epsForecast, pdf_url as pdfUrl FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(report_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, IFNULL(rating, '无评级') AS rating, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND report_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY month, rating ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(report_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND report_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT institution, MIN(report_date) AS first_date, COUNT(*) AS report_count FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND institution IS NOT NULL AND institution != '' GROUP BY institution ORDER BY report_count DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT MIN(report_date) FROM stock_research_report WHERE code = #{code} AND report_date IS NOT NULL
SELECT code, name, market FROM stock_info WHERE code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY code ASC LIMIT 20
